---
title: "Template 3"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Load libraries

```{r libraries}
library(phyloseq)
library(tidyverse)
library(DESeq2)
```

## Load data

```{r load-data}
# Load your phyloseq object here
# physeq <- readRDS("path/to/physeq.rds")
```

## Section 1

```{r section-1}
# Add your code here
```

## Section 2

```{r section-2}
# Add your code here
```

## Section 3

```{r section-3}
# Add your code here
```

---

*Generated with R `r R.version$major`.`r R.version$minor` and phyloseq `r packageVersion("phyloseq")`*
